title: cyclosorus prolifer
intro: Cyclosorus prolifer, also known as the 'Ferny-leaved Lady Fern', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus prolifer include its ability to treat fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a remedy for digestive problems and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
